# ChanomHub

> Your ultimate destination for adult gaming content. Discover free game downloads, translations, mods, and a vibrant community.

## About ChanomHub

ChanomHub is a leading community platform for adult games (H-games), providing curated content including:
- **Free Game Downloads**: Easily find and download a wide variety of adult games across multiple platforms (Windows, Android/APK, macOS, Linux, iOS, and Web).
- **Game Translations**: Community-driven and official translations (especially English and Thai translations) for popular visual novels, RPGs, and simulators.
- **Game Mods**: Add-ons, patches, and uncensor mods to enhance your gaming experience.
- **Vibrant Community**: Forums, Q&A boards, and discussions for gaming enthusiasts.

## Site Map & Key Sections

- **Homepage**: [https://chanomhub.com](https://chanomhub.com) - Features trending recommendations, sponsored posts, latest posts, and platform-specific game shelves.
- **Games Directory**: [https://chanomhub.com/games](https://chanomhub.com/games) - Complete list of adult games filterable by category, tag, and platform.
- **Windows H-Games**: [https://chanomhub.com/games?platform=windows](https://chanomhub.com/games?platform=windows) - Catalog of popular Windows-compatible adult games.
- **Android H-Games (APKs)**: [https://chanomhub.com/games?platform=android](https://chanomhub.com/games?platform=android) - Curated adult games optimized for Android mobile devices.
- **Community Tools**:
  - **ChanoX2**: [https://chanomhub.com/chanox2](https://chanomhub.com/chanox2) - Our custom desktop gaming client.
  - **ChanoLite**: [https://chanomhub.com/chanolite](https://chanomhub.com/chanolite) - Lightweight mobile client.
  - **NST Ghost**: [https://chanomhub.com/nst](https://chanomhub.com/nst) - Translation helper utility.
- **About & Privacy**: [https://chanomhub.com/privacy-policy](https://chanomhub.com/privacy-policy) - Terms and privacy statement.
